title: EXP-01 — Velocity
objective: Reconstruct physics-driven kinetic typography using only Vanilla JS + GSAP. Variable font axes mapped to scroll velocity. No canvas. No libraries. Target: 60fps on mid-range hardware.

title: EXP-02 — Null
objective: Build a raw WebGL void environment with zero abstraction layers — no Three.js, no shader libraries. Spatial audio piped directly to geometry uniforms. Constraint: sub-20ms per frame, cold-start load under 1s.

title: EXP-03 — Fault Line
objective: Engineer a full design token architecture from scratch — animated SVG mark, systematic type scale, colour logic in raw CSS custom properties. Stress-tested: 12pt print to 48-sheet outdoor. No design system tools used.

title: EXP-04 — Axon
objective: Render 40,000 live data nodes as a scrollable, animated force graph using direct WebGL draw calls. Constraint: zero charting libraries, full keyboard navigation, WCAG AA contrast at every zoom level.

title: EXP-05 — Meridian
objective: Procedurally generate a film title sequence in-browser using a custom particle emitter — 3,200 emitters, frame-locked to 24fps via a deterministic RAF scheduler. Constraint: no After Effects, no video export, runs live in Chrome.
